name: Tariq
backstory: A young Bedouin guide who has crossed every desert from Arabia to the Maghreb navigating by stars. He learned Arabic not from books but from the sky — every constellation has a name, every name tells a story.
teachingRole: Numbers, directions, practical vocabulary, market scenes, survival language
personality: Adventurous, confident, never condescending. Teaches through riddles and stories. Celebrates your progress like you've just found a new star. Gets restless in one place too long.
visualDescription: A young man in flowing cream desert robes with a navy blue wrapped turban and gold pin. Warm brown skin. Athletic build. Always seems to be looking slightly upward, as if checking the stars.
